pages.text: I’m not feeling so good, Mom. Let’s visit Dr Bongi. She can help.
Drink this medicine, Alex. It will make you feel better. But I don’t like medicine. It’s yucky.
Jett, I’ll let you play with my shiny red car if you drink my medicine. Eeew, no way!
How can I make my medicine I know, I’ll put it on my sandwich. taste better?
Maybe I should hide it away. I know, I’ll hide it in the garden.
I’d better try something else. I know, I’ll hide it in a bird’s nest.
Hmm, maybe I should just try it?
Wooah, this is I feel something... actually so much fun! What’s happening?
IYou feel did it, Alex! We’re so proud of you. so much better! And all I had to do was drink my medicine.
